name: drpy-node-mcp
description: MCP server for drpy-node: spider development, debugging, and file management tools
long_description: A comprehensive MCP server for drpy-node development. Provides tools for spider source management, rule debugging, file operations, database queries, and system configuration. Supports parsing HTML with drpy rules, validating spider syntax, and managing the drpy-node service.

ROOT.title: Project Root Directory
ROOT.description: Absolute path to your drpy-node project root directory. Leave empty to use auto-detection (looks for .drpy-root marker file or parent directory).

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories in the project

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the content of a file (automatically decodes DS sources)

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file (creates directories if needed)

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all spider sources (js and catvod)

tools.name: fetch_spider_url
tools.description: Fetch a URL using drpy-node's request library to debug connectivity and anti-crawling measures

tools.name: debug_spider_rule
tools.description: Debug drpy spider rules by parsing HTML or fetching URL

tools.name: get_spider_template
tools.description: Get a standard template for creating a new drpy JS source

tools.name: get_drpy_libs_info
tools.description: Get information about available global helper functions and libraries in drpy environment

tools.name: validate_spider
tools.description: Validate a drpy spider file (syntax check + structure validation)

tools.name: check_syntax
tools.description: Check syntax of a JavaScript file

tools.name: sql_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query on the project database

tools.name: manage_config
tools.description: Read or update the project configuration
